metodos.codigoOriginal:
LParameters poForm, pnDataSes, pcEscolha, pcProduto

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

Private pPro

Set DataSession to pnDataSes

=DoDefault()

Thisform.peAntValue = 0

With ThisForm
	.ParentForm = poForm
	.pcescolha = pcEscolha
	.houveincl = .F.
	.houveexcl = .F.

	If Type('pcProduto') = [C]
		pcPro = pcProduto
		.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)
		lcSql = [Select Dpros, pvens, pcuss From SigC... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If this.Tag <> this.Value
	If Not Empty(This.Value)
		loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.Parentform.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdTam', ;
							   'CrListaRemota', 'Cods', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

		If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
			loLista.mAddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Código')
			loLista.mAddColuna('Descs', '', 'Descriçăo')
			loLista.Show()
		EndIf
		
		If (Lastkey() <> 27)
			lnReg = Recno('crSigPrTam')
			
			Select a.CodTams ;
			  From crSigPrTam a ;
			 Where a.CodT... [TRUNCADO]

Local lCod,lFan,xObj

Local loLista

If this.Tag <> this.Value
	If Not Empty(This.Value)
		loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.Parentform.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdTam', ;
							   'CrListaRemota', 'Descs', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

		If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
			loLista.mAddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Código')
			loLista.mAddColuna('Descs', '', 'Descriçăo')
			loLista.Show()
		EndIf
		
		If (Lastkey() <> 27)
			Select a.CodTams ;
			  From crSigPrTam a ;
			 Where a.CodTams = CrList... [TRUNCADO]

If (This.Value <> ThisForm.peAntValue)
	Store 0 to lnPerc, lnValor
	If Not Empty(This.Value)
		lnPerc  = This.Value
		lnValor = crSigCdPro.PVens + (crSigCdPro.PVens * (lnPerc/100))
		*lnValor = crSigCdPro.PCuss * lnPerc 
		Replace Valor With lnValor in crSigPrTam
	EndIf 
EndIf

If (This.Value <> ThisForm.peAntValue)
	Store 0 To lnPerc, lnValor
	If Not Empty(This.Value)
		lnValor = This.Value
		If Empty(crSigCdPro.PVens)
			=MessageBox([Favor Informar o Preço de Venda do Produto.],0+64,[Aviso])
			lnValor = 0
			This.Value = lnValor
		EndIf 
		lnPerc  = ((lnValor - crSigCdPro.PVens)/crSigCdPro.PVens)*100
		*lnPerc  = Iif(Empty(crSigCdPro.PCuss),0,lnValor/crSigCdPro.PCuss)
		Replace Percs With lnPerc In crSigPrTam
	Endif
Endif

Select crSigPrTam

If Not Eof() And ( crSigPrTam.cPros = crSigCdPro.cPros )
	Delete
	Skip
	Skip - 1
Endif

Thisform.Houveexcl = .T.
Thisform.Grade.Refresh

If Thisform.cmdInserir.Visible Or Thisform.cmdExcluir.Visible
	If( InList(ThisForm.pcescolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR') ) 
		Select crSigPrTam
		Scan
			If( IsEmpty(crSigPrTam.CodTams) )
				MessageBox('Tamanho năo informado!',48,'Atençăo')
				Thisform.Grade.Column1.SetFocus ()
				Return .F.
			EndIf

*!*				If( IsEmpty(crSigPrTam.PesoMs) ) 
*!*					MessageBox([Peso médio do tamanho '] + crSigPrTam.CodTams + [' năo foi informado!],48,'Atençăo')
*!*					ThisForm.Grade.Column3.SetFocus()
*!*					Retur... [TRUNCADO]

ThisForm.houveincl = .T.

Select crSigPrTam
Locate for cPros = crSigCdPro.cPros And CodTams = Space(4)
If Eof()
	Insert Into crSigPrTam (cPros, CidChaves) Values (crSigCdPro.cPros,fUniqueIds())
EndIf

Select crSigPrTam
Thisform.Grade.Column1.SetFocus()

Select a.CodTams ; 			  From crSigPrTam a ; 			 Where a.CodT... [TRUNCADO]
Select a.CodTams ; 			  From crSigPrTam a ; 			 Where a.CodTams = CrList... [TRUNCADO]
